logger.doc:name: Flow Entry Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'test-get-flow', correlationId: correlationId, message: 'Flow execution started' }]

logger.doc:name: Before Transform Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'test-get-flow', correlationId: correlationId, message: 'Before building test response transform' }]

logger.doc:name: After Transform Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'test-get-flow', correlationId: correlationId, message: 'After building test response transform' }]

logger.doc:name: Flow Completion Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'test-get-flow', correlationId: correlationId, status: 'Flow execution completed successfully' }]

logger.doc:name: Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'test-get-flow', correlationId: correlationId, errorType: error.errorType, errorDescription: error.description, rootCause: error.cause, businessIdentifier: 'N/A' }]

logger.doc:name: Flow Entry Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'health-get-flow', correlationId: vars.correlationId, message: 'Health check flow execution started' }]

logger.doc:name: Flow Completion Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'health-get-flow', correlationId: vars.correlationId, status: 'Health check completed successfully' }]

logger.doc:name: Error Logger
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 output application/json --- { flowName: 'health-get-flow', correlationId: vars.correlationId, errorType: error.errorType, errorDescription: error.description, rootCause: error.cause, businessIdentifier: 'N/A' }]
